title: Consent to add to mailchimp automation
excerpt: I’m a relative newbie to Monday.com and have managed to setup the mailchimp integration to add email addresses to our mailchimp audience. is there any way to expand on the automation to “when a mailchimp consent status c…

posts.author: Linbury (Ben Evans)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’m a relative newbie to Monday.com and have managed to setup the mailchimp integration to add email addresses to our mailchimp audience. is there any way to expand on the automation to “when a mailchimp consent status column changes to YES, add the email from column (email address) to the mailchimp audience” ?
Is this possible?

posts.author: kim186flora (Kim Flora)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

Use Make.com (or Zapier) to watch for when the “Consent Status” column changes to “YES”, then send the email from the “Email” column to Mailchimp. Costco Business Center

Best Regard,
Kim

posts.author: Fantasy-Media-Team (Fantasy Media Team)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Linbury

We developed an app called Mailchimp Integration Plus that provides a robust integration with Mailchimp. Amongst other capabilities, it allows to do full mapping of fields from monday to Mailchimp, including custom fields for merge tags. Here’s an example →

Screenshot 2024-05-13 at 12.17.122714×1440 269 KB

You can find it in the monday.com marketplace in the platform or here:
Mailchimp Integration Plus.

Hope that helps!
